title: Rochester cancer mum's life 'saved' after hug from her mother
description: Selina Moss-Davies was initially told by a doctor that the tumour was 'nothing to worry about'.
content:
A woman who was told by her doctor that a lump in her breast was harmless says her life was probably saved after a hug from her mother.
Selina Moss-Davies, from Rochester in Kent, said she felt "no real rush" to get the lump sorted, but was urged to ... [1701 chars]

title: World Cup 2026: Goalkeeper tactical timeouts banned
description: Players at the 2026 World Cup will be stopped from going to the technical area to talk to coaches when goalkeepers are injured.
content:
Players at the 2026 World Cup will be stopped from going to the technical area to talk to coaches when goalkeepers are injured, Fifa referees' chief Pierluigi Collina has revealed.
The International Football Association Board (Ifab) has also approved... [6478 chars]

title: M6 remains closed after lorry crashes into barrier and overturns
description: The motorway is shut in both directions near the Warwickshire and Leicestershire border.
content:
The M6 remains closed in both directions after a lorry crashed into the central reservation barrier and overturned.
The closure was put in place between junction one near Rugby, Warwickshire, and the Catthorpe interchange in Leicestershire, after the... [382 chars]

title: Arsenal progress under Arteta is clear but flaws still remain for the ultimate glory
description: Penalty misses from pre-season were repeated in Budapest while summer signings could help the Gunners exert more control in the biggest games
content: When it was finally over – on the night and for the club season, devastation the overriding emotion for everyone connected to Arsenal – Declan Rice wanted to go back to make the point. To last July and his club’s first pre-season game, against Milan ... [6201 chars]
